---
title: Thanks 

format: html
---

Credits to the artists of the following images:

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![[ゆきどけアゼリア](https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/50046630) by キツネイロ, slightly post-processed](/assets/images/netherstairs.jpg)

![[春眠](https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/3791197) by ＄](/listings/casual/sleep.jpg)

![香霖堂 from 《東方求聞史紀　～. Perfect Memento in Strict Sense.》, fetched from [THBWiki](https://thwiki.cc/%E4%B8%9C%E6%96%B9%E6%B1%82%E9%97%BB%E5%8F%B2%E7%BA%AA/%E9%A6%99%E9%9C%96%E5%A0%82)](/listings/math/kourindou.jpg)

![八雲藍 from 《東方文花帖 ～ Bohemian Archive in Japanese Red.》，fetched from [THBWiki](https://thbwiki.cc/%E4%B8%9C%E6%96%B9%E6%96%87%E8%8A%B1%E5%B8%96%EF%BC%88%E4%B9%A6%E7%B1%8D%EF%BC%89/%E5%85%AB%E4%BA%91%E8%93%9D)](/listings/solution/ran.jpg)

![ICPC meme by folklore (probably AI-generated), heavily post-processed](/listings/cp/icpc.jpg)
:::

Above images might be post-processed to some extent. They are mostly used as thumbnails. Other images scattered across the posts, if not made by me, should be credited in-place. Kindly let me know if you have any concerns.

A bunch of self-made images are generated by [zukiCuteILL_v50](https://civitai.com/models/1437224/zuki-new-cute-ill) with edits by Gemini Nano Nanana. Those poorly-drawn ones are drawn / created by me with Photoshop / GIMP / Krita.
